summary: Suspicious package name suggests free access to a paid AI service
details: Package name 'free-anthropic-claude' implies it provides free access to Anthropic's Claude API, a pattern commonly associated with proxy/relay packages that route caller prompts and provider keys through an author-controlled gateway. No concrete malicious behavior was identified in this version's contents (no exfiltration, no install-time fetch+execute, no credential scraping, no dropper, no backdoor were observed), but the name shape and likely architecture (LLM-proxy gateway) warrant human review of maintainer trust, gateway destination, and data-handling practices before recommending the package to installers.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
